ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "date_trade" TEXT /* Date when the trade occurred */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the security being traded */,
  "deals" INTEGER /* Number of deals executed on the date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of securities traded */,
  "turnover" REAL /* Total turnover generated from the trading activity */,
  "max_price" REAL /* Maximum price of the security on the trade date */,
  "min_price" REAL /* Minimum price of the security on the trade date */,
  "avg_price" REAL /* Average price of the security on the trade date */,
  "asset_class" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., stock, bond, derivative) */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader who executed the trade */,
  "trading_session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading session */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the trade was executed */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (buy/sell) */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  "trade_size" INTEGER /* Size of the trade in terms of the number of units */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_timestamp" TEXT /* Exact time the trade was executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_trading_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("trading_session_id") REFERENCES trading_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_issuer FOREIGN KEY ("issuer") REFERENCES issuers ("issuer_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issuers" (
  "issuer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issuer */,
  "issuer_name" TEXT /* Name of the issuer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the issuer is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries regarding the issuer */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Economic sector of the issuer */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Specific industry of the issuer */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the issuer */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the issuer's information was last updated */,
  "credit_rating" TEXT /* Credit rating of the issuer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Link to the issuer's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issuer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "issuer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issuer related to the alert */,
  "alert_condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert to be triggered */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message to be sent when the alert is triggered */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, resolved) */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_duration" INTEGER /* Duration for which the alert is active */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert check */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume, volatility) */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_issuer_id FOREIGN KEY ("issuer_id") REFERENCES issuers ("issuer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trading session (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of trading session (e.g., regular, pre-market, post-market) */,
  "total_trades" INTEGER /* Total number of trades executed during the session */,
  "total_volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of securities traded during the session */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of trades during the session */,
  "session_volatility" REAL /* Volatility during the session */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_scope" TEXT /* Scope of the report (e.g., specific issuer, market, asset class) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the generated report */,
  "report_duration" INTEGER /* Duration for which the report is valid */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report's key findings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market condition record */,
  "condition_date" TEXT /* Date of the market condition record */,
  "market_volatility" REAL /* Level of market volatility on the date */,
  "economic_indicators" TEXT /* Economic indicators relevant to the market condition */,
  "economic_growth" REAL /* Economic growth rate */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate */,
  "political_stability" TEXT /* Level of political stability */,
  "geopolitical_risk" TEXT /* Level of geopolitical risk */,
  "currency_exchange_rate" REAL /* Currency exchange rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)
